name: A T & Sons Transportation Corp
districts_or_customers: Likely NYC DOE / OPT school bus contractor (Queens-based, Jamaica/Brookville section)
recent_news: No public news located; not identified in NYC OPT/NYC SBUS published carrier rosters during this research pass.
fit_notes: Small Queens-based operator at ~37 employees; if confirmed independent NYC OPT contractor, could be a sub-scale tuck-in but NYC OPT contract dynamics (Beacon/NYCSBUS dominance) limit standalone value. Need direct outreach to confirm operating status.

name: Idalmys School Bus Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade County area; likely serves Miami-Dade County Public Schools and/or private/charter schools in Hialeah area as private bus contractor
recent_news: No M&A or acquisition news located; appears to be a long-standing independent owner-operator (~14 years in business per Buzzfile).
fit_notes: Small Hispanic-owned single-operator in Hialeah/Miami-Dade; potential micro-tuck-in inside MDCPS approved-vendor list. Scale (~33 employees, ~$1.5M rev) makes it more of a roll-up add-on than standalone target; succession opportunity if founder is approaching retirement.

name: West End-Elliott Bus Assoc
districts_or_customers: Pittsburgh area (West End/Elliott neighborhoods, 15220); likely contractor to Pittsburgh Public Schools or area Catholic/charter schools historically.
recent_news: Not listed in current Pittsburgh Public Schools carrier roster (PPS uses First Student, Myers, Sierra, Briggs, Roenigk, ABC Transit, etc.). Address (406 S Main St) is now an apartment building, suggesting the operator may be defunct, relocated, or significantly downsized.
fit_notes: Possibly defunct or dormant - HQ address is now residential apartments and entity does not appear on current PPS carrier list. Low priority absent confirmation of active operations.

name: Barker Inc
principals: Doug Nichols (Manager - Dayton location); Barker family ownership (Kittanning HQ)
districts_or_customers: Armstrong School District (Dayton Elementary, West Shamokin HS), and multiple districts across Armstrong/Indiana/Jefferson counties PA; transports 20,000-25,000 children daily
recent_news: ~60 years in operation; estimated ~$5.9M annual revenue at Kittanning HQ; Dayton, PA location (170 N State St) is a satellite operations terminal supporting Armstrong School District contracts. No M&A activity located.
fit_notes: Strong tuck-in profile: family-owned ~60yr operator, ~160 buses, anchored to multi-year Armstrong SD contracts. Dayton, PA address is a yard/terminal, not the parent - true HQ is Kittanning (Barker Bus Company). Aggregate enterprise much larger than this single record suggests; worth approach directly to Barker family on succession. Note: the Dayton record may be a duplicate/satellite of the rank-level Kittanning enterprise.

name: Eshelman School Bus Svc
principals: Gregg Eshelman (President); Preston Eshelman (Sr Manager); Carol Sipf (Office Manager); 3rd/4th generation family ownership
districts_or_customers: Hamburg SD, Schuylkill Valley SD, Kutztown SD, Twin Valley SD, Lancaster Country Day School; also operates trucking division (nursery stock, quarried stone) and CDL training school
recent_news: 3rd/4th generation family-owned; ~85 years operating (started 1930s converting trucks, first commercial bus 1940); ~100+ vehicle fleet across 4 Berks County locations. No M&A activity located.
fit_notes: Very attractive tuck-in: 85-year-old multi-generational family operator with ~100 buses, diversified across 5 stable Berks/Lancaster County districts, plus complementary trucking and CDL school revenue. 3rd/4th gen ownership = realistic succession window. Strong Summit/Beacon overlap in PA market - fits regional consolidation thesis well.
